items.claim: Jared Cannonier has been dropped early in multiple recent fights.
items.quote: dropped two times in the first round.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's chin began to decline starting with the Caio Borralho fight.
items.quote: the chin really did not start to go south, I believe, until the Caio fight.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is 12 years younger than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: Duncan, much younger fighter here, 12 years younger than Jared

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a high-quality striking game.
items.quote: He's got He's got a pretty good striking game as well.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is one of the biggest middleweights in the division.
items.quote: Du Plessis is one of the biggest 185-pounders you can find.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's win over Joaquin Buckley has aged poorly because Buckley was dominated by Sean Brady.
items.quote: Usman's best win and only win in the last 5 years just got completely dominated by Sean Brady.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman will be unable to take Dricus Du Plessis down due to a significant strength disadvantage.
items.quote: I don't think Usman has a chance to out-wrestle DuPlessis.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis possesses significant knockout power.
items.quote: Dricus hits a lot harder than you think he does.
